ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for payment */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the invoice is issued */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the invoice */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the invoice (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was approved */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the invoice (e.g., net 30, net 60) */,
  "invoice_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items in this line */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item */,
  "line_total" REAL /* Total amount for this line item */,
  "taxable" INTEGER /* Whether the line item is taxable */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the line item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoice_lines_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person at the vendor's company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the vendor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the vendor is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vendor is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the vendor's location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the vendor is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the organization */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "note_content" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., payment reminder, invoice approval) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoice_sequences" (
  "sequence_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the sequence */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the sequence */,
  "increment_by" INTEGER /* Increment value of the sequence */,
  "datasource" TEXT /* Data source for the sequence */,
  "last_number_used" INTEGER /* Last number used in the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "headers" (
  "header_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each header */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "header_content" TEXT /* Content of the header */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the header was created */,
  "header_type" TEXT /* Type of header (e.g., invoice header, payment header) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("header_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_headers_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount for the line item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the line item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the invoice */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Total amount of tax for the invoice */,
  "tax_type" TEXT /* Type of tax (e.g., sales tax, VAT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxes_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., bank transfer, credit card) */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the attachment file */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)
